enabled.description: Whether or not object ttl is enabled for this collection (default: `false`).

defaultTtl.description: Interval (in seconds) to be added to `deleteOn` value, denoting object's expiration time. Has to be positive for `deleteOn` set to `_creationTimeUnix` or `_lastUpdateTimeUnix`, any for custom property (default: `0`).

deleteOn.description: Name of the property holding base time to compute object's expiration time (ttl = value of deleteOn property + defaultTtl). Can be set to `_creationTimeUnix`, `_lastUpdateTimeUnix` or custom property of `date` datatype.

filterExpiredObjects.description: Whether remove from resultset expired, but not yet deleted by background process objects (default: `false`).
